name: Sprinto
description: Sprinto is a compliance automation platform built specifically for cloud-native and SaaS startups. It offers SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, and HIPAA automation with an entity-risk approach that adapts to how modern companies are actually built.
use_cases: You're a cloud-native SaaS startup that needs SOC 2 certification in 4–6 weeks to unblock an enterprise sales deal
Your infrastructure is AWS or GCP-native and you want automated checks that map directly to how your stack is actually configured
You need GDPR and ISO 27001 coverage simultaneously without managing separate compliance programmes for each framework
Your team is small and needs hands-on audit support from Sprinto's compliance team, not just software
